source_baseline: TTS Castle Wars by stom66/searanger, based on m0rkeulv Castle Wars; mechanics transcribed for design/implementation reference only.
turn_order: randomly Blue or Red in source; for automated tests use deterministic seed.

resource_generation.amount: each worker/circle produces one matching resource unless production buff changes it

damage_rules.normal: damage hits wall/ward first; overflow damages castle/citadel
damage_rules.bypass: damage ignores wall/ward and hits castle/citadel
damage_rules.magic_defence: next attack deals 0 damage and consumes defence buff before wall/castle resolution

buffs.attack: Double next outgoing attack damage, then consume.
buffs.build: Double next castle or wall construction amount, then consume.
buffs.defence: Negate all damage from next incoming attack, then consume.
buffs.resources: Block next remove-resource effect, then consume.

source_code_quirks_to_decide: Thief in source adds resources to current player before attempting to remove from opponent; if opponent has Protect Resources, opponent may keep resources while thief still gains them.
Reverse has a wall cost of 4 but player affordability ignores wall costs; playing with <4 wall sets wall to 0 and still raises castle.
